# Acme Widgets

**Website:** https://acme.example   **Industry:** Industrial supply
**Size:** $5–10M · 20–50 people   **Lifecycle:** Scaling
**Geography:** Single office (Cleveland)
**Last updated:** 2026-06-10

---

## What we do

Acme sells industrial widgets to regional manufacturers, mostly on net-30 terms.

## Org shape

- **Owner** — runs sales and ops → [owner.md](roles/owner.md)

## Stack (current)

- **Shopify** — storefront → [shopify.md](tools/shopify.md)

## Key records

- **Order** — a customer purchase · owned by [shopify.md](tools/shopify.md)

## Workflows

- **Order intake** — taking and fulfilling an order → [order-intake.md](workflows/order-intake.md)

## Primary goal

Cut the time between order placed and order shipped.

## Top pains

- "Orders get re-keyed three times" — *stated*

## Recent timeline

Hired a second fulfillment person last quarter.

## Maturity signal

Process is mostly in one owner's head; tools are solid but disconnected.

- **Level:** 2 → 3
- **C in play:** Consistency
- **Lever (P / P / T):** Process

## Pointer

For prioritized goals and problems, see [.ai-ops/pains-and-bottlenecks.md](.ai-ops/pains-and-bottlenecks.md).
